title: Let 'Er Go Gallegher
writer: Elliott J. Clawson, John W. Krafft
actors: Frank Coghlan Jr., Harrison Ford, Elinor Fair
plot: Young John Gallagher wants to be a newspaper reporter. One day he witnesses a murder committed by a mysterious man with only four fingers on one hand. He gives his account of the murder and a description of the killer to his hero,...
